task_updates.executor_notes: Extended ToolContext with optional transport, blob, and external_queue fields and added ExternalSpec with provider, endpoint, request_summary, and optional request_body. Updated send_message so invocation mode uses store.create_message(..., synthesize_outbound_id=True) and preserves synthetic Discord IDs, while resident mode uses synthesize_outbound_id=False, leaves discord_message_id NULL, and appends a Discord post callable to external_queue. The callable posts through transport.post_message, updates the message row via store.update_message, and returns provider id plus response summary. Updated set_activity to persist current_activity on the turn. Minimal SQLite create_message synthesize flag and update_message support were added so current tests and the resident callable can execute before the broader T9 SQLite expansion. Verification: tests/test_communication_resident.py passed, existing tests/test_tool_kit.py plus run_turn/CLI/envelope modules passed, and full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 33 tests.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended Store Protocol with find_abandoned_turns, find_pending_external_requests, mark_orphaned, find_unprocessed_messages, load_messages, update_message, image CRUD methods, and the create_message synthesize_outbound_id flag. Added Blob.exists. Added new PushTransport Protocol with start, stop, post_message, edit_message, download_attachment, and fetch_recent_messages, while leaving the existing Transport Protocol without push methods. Verification: tests/test_ports_v1b.py passed, signature smoke check confirmed the new protocol members and that Transport lacks post_message, and full `python -m pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` passed with 33 tests. Source-tree leaked-prefix grep returned zero matches.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. ToolContext has optional transport/blob/external_queue defaults; send_message preserves invocation synthetic IDs with synthesize_outbound_id=True and queues resident Discord post/update callable with synthesize_outbound_id=False; set_activity persists current_activity. Tests cover invocation, resident queue/callback update, and activity persistence.

Yes. Store Protocol contains the new recovery/message/image methods and create_message synthesize_outbound_id flag; Blob has exists; PushTransport is a new separate Protocol with the requested push/download/fetch methods; and the existing Transport Protocol remains without post_message.
